author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: Using Cephes-style polynomial approximations with explicit range reduction. These are the same algorithms used by SLEEF/Intel VML but written as simple scalar code that LLVM auto-vectorizes. Key design: no branches in the hot path (use select/blend via conditional moves), Horner scheme for polynomial evaluation, bit manipulation for 2^n scaling. Targeting <1 ULP accuracy for exp, <2 ULP for log.
